Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Plntf'S Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production Of Documents And Req. For Statement Of Damages And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Form and Special Interrogatories, Demand For Production Of Documents, and Request For Statement of Damages is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $800, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-15-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
